roadmap_item: drsti-dev-flow mission template — fleet command --template drsti-dev-flow
maturity_rationale: New feature with writer/reviewer split — adds to core template registry and requires tests

spec.self_review: clean — shape, constraints all pass, briefs actionable
spec.peer_review: 4 issues found and resolved: dropped level label from description, noted branch-rename in briefs, strengthened test assertions, accepted missing plan phase as L3 design

code.self_review: clean — all MissionTemplate constraints satisfied, 7/7 tests pass, no scope drift
code.peer_review: 1 issue found and resolved: description assertion strengthened from expect.any(String) to toContain('Governed development workflow')

review_gate.tests_uat: 7/7 unit tests pass — listTemplates returns 6, drsti-dev-flow template shape verified, dependency chain M1→M2→M3 verified, all missions match structural constraints

verification: drsti-dev-flow template present in BUILTIN_TEMPLATES with correct id/branch/brief/agent/depends
notes: Spec peer review raised 4 issues — all resolved before implementation
Issue 1 fix: removed level label from description, now says 'governed development workflow'
Issue 2: accepted — L3 does not require a plan phase, spec→implement→review is correct
Issue 3 fix: each brief instructs agent to rename branch for specific feature
Issue 4 fix: new test asserts name, description, missions[0].id, not just length
Code peer review raised 1 issue — resolved: description assertion strengthened to toContain('Governed development workflow')
